body:
<!-- hive-mind:working-session-summary -->
## Working session summary

Implemented and finalized [PR #726](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/726).

- `Report` now creates a real GitHub issue through `gh`, including unnamed OpenCode tool results.
- OpenCode sessions advertise native `websearch`.
- Added multilingual, HTTP-surface, shell-quoting, and real Agent CLI regressions.
- Fresh [CI run 29384776234](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/actions/runs/29384776234) is green.
- PR is ready, mergeable, based on current `main`, and the working tree is clean.

Solution draft log metadata and authenticated Gist link: https://gist.githubusercontent.com/konard/8c4c1fb07ca7bb9c651bc5cea41c1731/raw/5edd4a52f41333d65e3566e2470433f58627f57c/tmp-solution-draft-log-pr-1784084494514.txt.log.txt
Ready to merge: CI passed, no merge conflicts, no pending changes.

We need make the analysis deeper and fully implement vision from https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/714 using auto learning, and same task execution using Formal AI via Agent CLI.

See our contributing guidelines, testing guidelines, vision, roadmap and so on. I expect this pull request to cover the most ambitious of requirements through generalization of logic, reasoning, advancing our meta algorithm to the highest possible potential. If you see something that still obsolete or contradicts generalization - it must be fixed.

It is ok to change architecture to move toward our goals of generalization in any place you touch.

Please plan and execute everything in this single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
AI Work Session Started at 2026-07-15T14:20:57.659Z; PR converted to draft while work is in progress.
